tests.source_program:
define noundef range(i32 0, 100) i32 @ceil_div_known(i32 noundef %x) {
entry:
  %shift = lshr i32 %x, 4
  %mask = and i32 %x, 15
  %nonzero = icmp ne i32 %mask, 0
  %zext = zext i1 %nonzero to i32
  %result = add nuw i32 %shift, %zext
  ret i32 %result
}
